channel.title: Dhaka Tribune - Opinion
channel.description: Op-Eds, Editorials and Longform from Dhaka Tribune

item.title: Protecting the future of the RMG industry
item.description: The decline in Bangladesh’s readymade garment (RMG) exports to the European Union is a warning sign that absolutely cannot be ignored....

item.title: Zero tolerance for hate speech
item.description: Today is International Day for Countering Hate Speech, and the United Nations’ observance of this day highlights the growing global concern...

item.title: Pakistan’s move to MENAAP: Why Bangladesh should pay attention
item.description: Earlier this year, the World Bank moved Pakistan out of its South Asia regional grouping and...

item.title: Planting trees is good
item.description: It is encouraging that the Bangladesh government has launched the ambitious "National Green...
